highlights: Represented NCU at the National University Games (全大運) in 5000m and 10000m events
Competed in intercollegiate track meets throughout undergraduate study
Organized beginner cycling workshops and group training rides
Managed club Facebook and Instagram accounts, creating promotional content and event posts
Provided 110 hours of free online after-school tutoring to junior high and high school students in Taitung (台東高中 / 台東新生國中)
